assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `context.IssuedClaims.Add(new Claim(JwtClaimTypes.Name, user.DisplayName)); return;` for identity tokens

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `context.AddRequestedClaims(claims)` for the non-identity-token path
